working_on.task: Fixed teacher detailed results view and math rendering
working_on.notes: Fixed CheckCircle reference error. Replaced raw dangerouslySetInnerHTML spans with MathSpan to resolve math rendering issues in MATCHING, TRUE_FALSE, ORDERING, etc. Updated quizStore to handle GAS-style keys for results.

pending_tasks.task: Verify Categorization rendering logic in Student View
Check Drag & Drop word pool behavior after D1 mapping fix

recent_changes.description: Fixed missing Quiz Results for Teachers caused by D1 mapping, fixed Vite compilation errors, fixed ReferenceError in StudentDetailModal, and fixed Math rendering issues using MathSpan.

errors_encountered.error: Math equations like \frac{2}{3} < \frac{3}{4} not rendering in teacher DetailView
errors_encountered.solution: Replaced dangerouslySetInnerHTML raw spans with <MathSpan> component in StudentDetailModal for all complex question types.

errors_encountered.error: ReferenceError: CheckCircle is not defined in StudentDetailModal.tsx
errors_encountered.solution: Added missing import for CheckCircle from lucide-react.

decisions_made.decision: Use MathSpan instead of raw dangerouslySetInnerHTML
decisions_made.reason: MathSpan is purpose-built to safely handle MathJax without React reconciliation conflicts, eliminating the need to strip $ symbols or use formatHtmlText which escapes brackets.
